name: 𝐌𝐑𝐁𝐄𝐑𝐋𝐈𝐍 𝐁𝐨𝐭
description: 𝑻𝒆𝒙𝒕 𝑳𝒆𝒆𝒄𝒉 𝑽𝒊𝒅𝒆𝒐 𝑬𝒙𝒕𝒓𝒂𝒄𝒕𝒐𝒓 𝑭𝒐𝒓 𝑻𝒆𝒍𝒆𝒈𝒓𝒂𝒎

API_ID.description: Your Telegram API ID — get it from https://my.telegram.org

API_HASH.description: Your Telegram API HASH — get it from https://my.telegram.org

BOT_TOKEN.description: Your Bot Token — get it from @BotFather on Telegram

OWNER.description: Your Telegram User ID — get it by sending /id to the bot after deploy

CREDIT.description: Bot credit name shown in captions (6–8 letters recommended)

MONGO_URI.description: MongoDB Atlas URI — stores auth users, chats, topics across restarts
